name: gitea
description: Work with Gitea repositories, issues, pull requests, commits, branches, and repository contents from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect and work in Gitea repositories
interface.longDescription: Use Gitea from Codex through a bundled MCP server backed by the official Gitea REST API. The plugin can inspect repositories, read and write repository contents, triage issues, review pull requests, browse commits and branches, and call advanced API routes without storing private instance details in the plugin.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this Gitea repo, summarize open issues, and propose next steps
Review the latest Gitea pull request and identify risky changes
Create a Gitea issue for the concrete findings in this repo
